message.content:
### 1. Page Type Identification  
The image contains **three distinct screens**:  
- **Left Screen**: Register/signup page (account type selection).  
- **Middle Screen**: Register/signup page (account creation form).  
- **Right Screen**: Account settings page.  


### 2. UI Elements (All Visible)  
#### Left Screen (Register/Signup - Account Type)  
- **Header**:  
  - "DTTUBE" logo (red "D", white "TUBE").  
  - "Create Your Account" (white, bold).  
  - Subtitle: "Join the global creator ecosystem" (gray, smaller).  
- **Progress Bar**: 3-step indicator (steps 1, 2, 3) with step 1 highlighted (purple circle).  
- **Section**: "Choose Account Type" (white, bold).  
- **Account Type Cards** (6 total, 2x3 grid):  
  - **Personal**: Purple icon (person), "Personal" (white), "For individuals" (gray). Checkmark (purple) on top-right.  
  - **Creator**: Red icon (camera), "Creator" (white), "For content creators" (gray).  
  - **Business**: Yellow icon (briefcase), "Business" (white), "For businesses" (gray).  
  - **NGO**: Green icon (leaf), "NGO" (white), "For organizations" (gray).  
  - **Government**: Blue icon (building), "Government" (white), "For institutions" (gray).  
  - **Other**: Gray icon (dots), "Other" (white), "Other account type" (gray).  
- **Benefits List** (under "Personal" card):  
  - Star icon + "Start as Level 1 Creator" (gray).  
  - Flame icon + "Earn XP from uploads, watchtime, shares" (gray).  
  - Trophy icon + "Unlock badges & monetization" (gray).  
- **Buttons**:  
  - "Continue" (pink-to-purple gradient, bold white text).  
  - "Already have an account? Log In" (gray text, purple "Log In" link).  


#### Middle Screen (Register/Signup - Form)  
- **Header**:  
  - Back arrow (white).  
  - "Create Your Account" (white, bold).  
  - "Step 2 of 3" (gray, smaller).  
- **Progress Bar**: 3-step indicator (steps 1, 2, 3) with step 2 highlighted (purple circle).  
- **Profile Section**:  
  - Purple gradient avatar (person icon).  
  - Camera icon (white, top-right of avatar).  
- **Form Fields** (5 total, vertical list):  
  - Full Name: Icon (person), label ("Full Name"), input ("John Doe"), green checkmark (right).  
  - Username: Icon (user), label ("Username"), input ("@johndoe"), green checkmark (right).  
  - Email: Icon (envelope), label ("Email"), input ("johndoe@email.com"), green checkmark (right).  
  - Password: Icon (lock), label ("Password"), input (masked "••••••••"), eye icon (show/hide, gray).  
  - Confirm Password: Icon (lock), label ("Confirm Password"), input (masked "••••••••"), eye icon (show/hide, gray).  
- **Password Requirements** (3 green checkmarks, left of form):  
  - "At least 8 characters" (gray text).  
  - "Include number and letter" (gray text).  
  - "Password match" (gray text).  
- **Button**: "Continue" (pink-to-purple gradient, bold white text).  


#### Right Screen (Account Settings)  
- **Header**:  
  - Back arrow (white).  
  - "Account Settings" (white, bold, right-aligned).  
  - Bell icon (white) with red notification badge (3).  
- **Profile Section**:  
  - Circular avatar (photo of a man).  
  - "John Doe" (white, bold) + blue verified checkmark.  
  - "@johndoe" (gray).  
  - "Content Creator" (purple).  
  - "View Profile" button (dark gray, white text, right-aligned).  
- **Elite Creator Card**:  
  - Purple hexagon badge with gold crown icon.  
  - "Elite Creator" (gold, bold).  
  - "Level 42" (white, bold).  
  - "1,215,450 XP" (gray).  
  - Progress bar (purple, 76% filled) + "76% to Level 43" (green).  
  - "Top 1% Creators" (purple, right-aligned).  
- **Stats Row** (4 items, horizontal):  
  - Flame icon + "56" (white) + "Day Streak" (gray).  
  - Star icon + "8.7M" (white) + "Creator Score" (gray).  
  - Chart icon + "Top 0.8%" (white) + "Global Rank" (gray).  
  - Trophy icon + "24" (white) + "Badges" (gray).  
- **Section**: "View Level Progress & Rewards" (white, bold) + right arrow (gray).  
- **Settings List** (7 items, vertical):  
  - **Account Information**: Icon (person), label ("Account Information"), subtitle ("Update your personal info"), right arrow (gray).  
  - **Privacy & Security**: Icon (shield), label ("Privacy & Security"), subtitle ("Manage privacy, password, 2FA"), right arrow (gray).  
  - **Verification**: Icon (checkmark, blue), label ("Verification"), subtitle ("Manage your verification badge"), right arrow (gray).  
  - **Wallet**: Icon (wallet), label ("Wallet"), subtitle ("Balance, earnings & transactions"), right arrow (gray).  
  - **Creator Tools**: Icon (wrench), label ("Creator Tools"), subtitle ("Monetization, studio, analytics"), right arrow (gray).  
  - **Notifications**: Icon (bell), label ("Notifications"), subtitle ("Manage your notification preferences"), right arrow (gray).  
- **Bottom Navigation Bar**:  
  - Home: Icon (home), label ("Home").  
  - Shorts: Icon (play), label ("Shorts").  
  - Add: Purple circle with "+" (white).  
  - Subscriptions: Icon (list), label ("Subscriptions").  
  - Profile: Icon (person), label ("Profile").  


### 3. Layout Structure  
#### Left Screen (Top to Bottom)  
1. Header (logo, title, subtitle).  
2. Progress bar.  
3. "Choose Account Type" section.  
4. 2x3 grid of account type cards.  
5. "Continue" button.  
6. "Log In" link.  


#### Middle Screen (Top to Bottom)  
1. Header (back arrow, title, subtitle).  
2. Progress bar.  
3. Profile section (avatar + camera).  
4. Form fields (vertical list).  
5. Password requirements (left of form).  
6. "Continue" button.  


#### Right Screen (Top to Bottom)  
1. Header (back arrow, title, bell icon).  
2. Profile section (avatar, name, verified checkmark, "View Profile").  
3. Elite Creator card (badge, level, XP, progress).  
4. Stats row (horizontal).  
5. "View Level Progress & Rewards" section.  
6. Settings list (vertical).  
7. Bottom navigation bar.  


### 4. Colors, Gradients, Styling  
- **Background**: Dark navy (#121212 or similar).  
- **Text**:  
  - Primary: White (#FFFFFF).  
  - Secondary: Gray (#888888).  
  - Accent: Purple (#9333EA), pink (#EC4899), red (#DC2626), green (#10B981), blue (#3B82F6), yellow (#F59E0B).  
- **Gradients**:  
  - "Continue" buttons: Pink-to-purple (linear gradient, #EC4899 to #9333EA).  
  - Avatar: Purple-to-pink gradient (#9333EA to #EC4899).  
- **Borders/Dividers**: Light gray (#333333) for card outlines.  
- **Icons**: White (default), colored (e.g., purple for verified checkmark, blue for verification).  


### 5. Icons/Imagery  
- **Logos**: "DTTUBE" (red "D", white "TUBE").  
- **Account Type Icons**: Person (purple), camera (red), briefcase (yellow), leaf (green), building (blue), dots (gray).  
- **Form Icons**: Person (full name), user (username), envelope (email), lock (password), eye (show/hide).  
- **Settings Icons**: Person (account), shield (privacy), checkmark (verification), wallet (wallet), wrench (creator tools), bell (notifications).  
- **Stats Icons**: Flame (streak), star (score), chart (rank), trophy (badges).  
- **Bottom Nav Icons**: Home, play (shorts), plus (add), list (subscriptions), person (profile).  
- **Avatars**: Circular photos (e.g., profile photo on right screen, gradient avatar on middle screen).  


### 6. Form Fields  
| Field              | Label       | Placeholder/Value       | Input Type       |  
|--------------------|-------------|-------------------------|------------------|  
| Full Name          | Full Name   | John Doe                | Text             |  
| Username           | Username    | @johndoe                | Text             |  
| Email              | Email       | johndoe@email.com       | Email            |  
| Password           | Password    | •••••••••               | Password (masked)|  
| Confirm Password   | Confirm Password | •••••••••           | Password (masked)|  


### 7. Toggles, Dropdowns, Special Controls  
- **Eye Icons**: Show/hide password toggles (gray, right of password fields).  
- **Checkmarks**: Green checkmarks (right of form fields, password requirements).  
- **Verified Checkmark**: Blue checkmark (next to "John Doe" on right screen).  
- **Progress Bar**: Purple (76% filled, right screen).  
- **Notification Badge**: Red circle with "3" (top-right of right screen header).  


This breakdown covers all visual elements, layout, colors, and interactions for recreating the UI.
